subject: refactor(hooks): extract useDialogSync, fix a11y, remove dead code
body:
Code review cleanup from /simplify pass:

- Extract useDialogSync hook — eliminates ~70 lines of duplicated
  dialog open/close/backdrop/escape sync code across 4 modal components
- Add missing aria-label="Close dialog" on 3 icon-only close buttons
  (TutorialModal, InstallInstructionsModal, KeyboardShortcutsOverlay)
- Remove unused checkboxRef from CollapsibleSection

Tags: hooks, a11y, cleanup, modal, refactor
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch

title: extract useDialogSync, fix a11y, remove dead code
